device_name: Deep Learning Image Reconstruction for Gemstone Spectral Imaging
intended_use: The Deep Learning Image Reconstruction for Gemstone Spectral Imaging option is intended for whole body, vascular, and contrast enhanced head CT applications.
intended_use_full: The Deep Learning Image Reconstruction for Gemstone Spectral Imaging option is intended for whole body, vascular, and contrast enhanced head CT applications.
ground_truth: ASiR-V reconstruction and board-certified radiologist assessment via reader study
other_metrics: Low contrast detectability (LCD), image noise (pixel standard deviation), high contrast spatial resolution (MTF), contrast to noise ratio (CNR), CT number accuracy, CT number uniformity, material decomposition accuracy, iodine detection, metal artifact reduction; reader study using 5-point Likert scale for image quality assessment
